title: lupinus arizonicus subsp. sonorensis
intro: Lupinus arizonicus subsp. sonorensis, commonly known as the Sonoran lupine, is a plant species in the genus Lupinus, a group of flowering plants in the pea family Fabaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off bacterial infections. The Sonoran lupine has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Lupinus arizonicus subsp. sonorensis can be found in supplement form and are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
